style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in French. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial illustration of a single aging application drawn as an old vehicle raised on a lift inside a clean, orderly repair garage, with a modern engine and new parts being fitted while the body stays the same. A sense of one-at-a-time careful repair. Muted Alberta cream palette, navy and rust accents, archival print quality, no text. All text labels in Canadian French. Match the composition of the source image exactly; only the text labels change.
composed_prompt:
Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in French. No photo realism, no people, no logos.

Subject: An editorial illustration of a single aging application drawn as an old vehicle raised on a lift inside a clean, orderly repair garage, with a modern engine and new parts being fitted while the body stays the same. A sense of one-at-a-time careful repair. Muted Alberta cream palette, navy and rust accents, archival print quality, no text. All text labels in Canadian French.
